description: The Camera di controllo is a governing and coordinating body of the 'Ndrangheta outside Calabria, established since the 1970s. It resolves disputes among locali (local units) and grants higher-level ranks. Known cameras exist in Lombardy, Liguria, Canada, Australia, and Germany. The Lombardy camera oversees numerous locali in northern Italy.

country_links.evidence_quote: e una in Australia (anch'essa nominata Crimine).
country_links.context: The Camera di controllo has a chapter in Australia, also named Crimine, which coordinates locali across the country.

country_links.evidence_quote: ne sono state individuate una in Canada (la cosiddetta camera di controllo dell'Ontario chiamata Crimine...)
country_links.context: The Camera di controllo has a chapter in Canada, known as the Ontario control chamber called Crimine, which coordinates locali in Ontario.

country_links.evidence_quote: Dalla Camera dipendono anche i locali del Basso Piemonte e della Francia meridionale.
country_links.context: The Camera di controllo in Liguria oversees locali in southern France, indicating the organization's presence there.

country_links.evidence_quote: A febbraio 2021 né sarebbe emersa un'altra in Germania.
country_links.context: A Camera di controllo was established in Germany after the 2007 Duisburg massacre, consisting of 9 members from prominent German clans.
